title: Thread Lifecycle and Synchronization using isAlive() and join()
description: A flowchart showing the main thread's flow of execution when using isAlive() to check on a child thread and join() to wait for its completion.
relationships: Main Thread uses isAlive() to check Child Thread status
If Child Thread is alive, Main Thread calls join() to wait
join() blocks Main Thread until Child Thread terminates
Main Thread continues execution after join()
